{{Dialogue|Lyari|Come on, bright boy. Give us a chance.|Luke|No. That would never work.|Zelara|Why not?|Luke|Because I have lips, and you have beaks, for starters.|attr=The two Ishi Tib females make a pass on Luke Skywalker|src=<ref name="DN1">''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]''</ref>}}
'''Lyari''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Ishi Tib/Legends|Ishi Tib]] who was at the [[Lizil (Hive)|Lizil]] [[Lizil|nest]] at [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]] with her companion [[Zelara]]. They became attracted to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] as part of a failed attempt on his part to use [[Mind trick/Legends#Force persuasion|Force persuasion]] on them, resulting in an uncomfortable situation for the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]].

{{Char-stub}}
